rows.label: tev015601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev015601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Oliver about his work.

rows.label: tev015601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev015601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Oliver if he has any interesting news.

rows.label: tev015601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Oliver about his experiences with the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev015601_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Oliver about his
experiences with the Bias.

rows.label: tev015601_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Oliver for his opinions on
the xenoforms living in NLA.

rows.label: tev015601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Oliver if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Due to a shortage of construction
workers, little progress had been
made in building the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0002
rows.name:
We just need a good idea on how
to turn this sad state of affairs
arou—Hey! I've got it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0003
rows.name:
You know those grex indigens that are
always running wild outside the city?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0004
rows.name:
They're a hearty breed! What if we
captured a few, strapped 'em to carts,
and used them to haul heavy materials?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Wait. Wait, wait. No. That's dumb. I'm
an idiot. They'd probably eat everybody the
moment we let 'em come inside the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hmm... I have to keep searching for the
right idea. I can't allow NLA to languish
in this unfinished state forever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0008
rows.name:
I ran into a BLADE named Robert at the west gate when
I went to the industrial district to get materials.
That guy is so unbelievably careful about everything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0009
rows.name:
He double and triple checks all his equipment,
and pursues all his missions in the most meticulous
fashion possible. Dude just exudes prudence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0010
rows.name:
You ever hear the expression "measure twice,
cut once?" Well I don't even want to know how
many times Robert measures before he cuts![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0011
rows.name:
There's got to be an expression for that,
right? Like, "measure nine times, forget
to cut," or...I dunno. I'll work on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0016
rows.name:
"What's this thingy, maybe?" "What's
up with that?" Arggh! Why can't the
Ma-non shut up with their questions?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Dealing with the Ma-non is exhausting.
It's like trying to hold a conversation
with a really unconfident hummingbird.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0018
rows.name:
I guess I should just go eat some
of that shinuyuni garlic that
grows in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0019
rows.name:
Because there's no way I'm ever
gonna be able to deal with them
if I don't have enough energy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Look at that Bias over there! Picking up a crate
that I couldn't lift in a million years and tossing
it around as if it were made of tissue paper.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0026
rows.name:
It's great being able to move stuff like that
without having to use heavy machinery, but good
sweet lord, you would not BELIEVE how much they eat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0027
rows.name:
Each one gobbles down as much food as 20 humans!
I'd still take them over heavy machinery any day,
but the machines got 'em beat at fuel efficiency.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0028
rows.name:
Their favorite food are these
nutrient-packed snails called ashizel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0029
rows.name:
They live on the plains outside the
east gate. I oughta just hire a BLADE
to go collect a whole bunch for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0035
rows.name:
First it was the Ma-non, then
the Bias, and now we got Orphe
and Larsians and Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0036
rows.name:
I never imagined NLA would end up
crawling with xenoforms like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0037
rows.name:
Don't get me wrong, I hate the
alien bastards who blew up Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG0038
rows.name:
But it's nice that there are good
xenos as well as bad. You can never
have too many friends, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG1001
rows.name:
So I talked to Robert—he's a BLADE—at
the west gate when I went to pick up
materials in the industrial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG1002
rows.name:
He said he ran into some real
trouble on this joint mission
he did with a group of Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG1003
rows.name:
Being the perfectionist that he is, he serviced every
part of his armored vehicle and thought it was good
to go. But you'll never guess what happened next![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015601_MSG1004
rows.name:
...Huh? You're the one who helped
him out of that situation? Oh,
wow! You're pretty incredible![ST:wait ]
